creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
1. Please repocopy security/libfwbuilder to security/libfwbuilder2.
2. Please repocopy security/fwbuilder to security/fwbuilder2.

This is to facilitate the inclusion of fwbuilder 3.0.0 into ports while
maintaining fwbuilder 2.1.9 until the author desupports it.
